description: Minute fragment. On Recto an opening of a marriage document which might be connected to the verso. On verso an opening of a betrothal deed. The bride's name is Sitt al-Hus[n]. Although the verb use is אירש, as commonly found in Karaite marriage deeds, this deed is probably Rabbinate, see Ashur, Engagement and Bethrotal, p. 45, n. 157. AA
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
